nasb.text: This shall be yours from the most holy gifts reserved from the fire; every offering of theirs, even every grain offering and every sin offering and every guilt offering, which they shall render to Me, shall be most holy for you and for your sons.

esv.text: This shall be yours of the most holy things, reserved from the fire: every offering of theirs, every grain offering of theirs and every sin offering of theirs and every guilt offering of theirs, which they render to me, shall be most holy to you and to your sons.

cnv.text: 以色列人所獻一切不經過火、至聖的供物，就是一切素祭、一切贖罪祭和一切贖愆祭，都要作至聖的物，歸給你和你的子孫。

ccb.text: 以色列人献给我的至圣之物——素祭、赎罪祭和赎过祭中留下不烧的部分都归你和你的子孙。
